data.content:
Implementation complete for Claude Code approval support.

Branch: codex/foolery-94da-claude-approvals
Commit: 39fe8f69 feat(claude): support approval prompt launch mode
Worktree: /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-94da

Summary:
- Added per-agent `approvalMode = "prompt"` to launch Claude without `--dangerously-skip-permissions`; omitted or `"bypass"` preserves existing autonomous behavior.
- Centralized Claude prompt and interactive arg construction in `src/lib/agent-adapter.ts`; initial and take-loop launch helpers now share it.
- Plumbed `approvalMode` through schemas, types, settings normalization/target conversion, settings API, OpenAPI schema, and docs.
- Confirmed Claude AskUserQuestion approval extraction already exists; tightened Claude fixture assertions for adapter/source/toolUseId only.
- Added focused launch-arg tests and split oversized adapter tests into smaller files to keep ESLint size gates green.

Verification:
- bun run test src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter-copilot-gemini.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/claude-approval-launch-args.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-visibility.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-runtime.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/settings-agents.test.ts
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run build

Coordination note: `src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-visibility.test.ts` was only changed with Claude-specific assertions on the existing AskUserQuestion fixture, avoiding Worker A's OpenCode fixture area.
